summary: The diff implements both REQ-9 and REQ-10 thoroughly. The backend (backend/main.mo) now uses the Google Custom Search API URL with cx=a566dfe30b89f4713, replacing DuckDuckGo. The frontend (useQueries.ts, useTabManager.ts, SearchResults.tsx, BrowserLayout.tsx) parses and renders Google Custom Search API response fields (title, link, snippet, displayLink) in the Cheetah dark theme. All acceptance criteria appear satisfied.
